scripts.android:doctor: bash -lc 'set -e; echo "Android build prerequisites"; echo "- Node: $(node -v)"; echo "- pnpm: $(pnpm -v)"; if java -version >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "- Java: OK"; else echo "- Java: MISSING"; echo "  Fix (Homebrew): brew install --cask temurin@17"; echo "  Verify: java -version"; fi; if [[ -n "${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-}" ]]; then echo "- ANDROID_SDK_ROOT: ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}"; elif [[ -n "${ANDROID_HOME:-}" ]]; then echo "- ANDROID_HOME: ${ANDROID_HOME}"; elif [[ -d "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ]]; then echo "- Android SDK: found at $HOME/Library/Android/sdk"; else echo "- Android SDK: MISSING"; echo "  Fix (Homebrew): brew install --cask android-studio"; echo "  Then open Android Studio once to install SDK + accept licenses."; echo "  Expected SDK path: $HOME/Library/Android/sdk"; fi; echo ""; echo "Cloud fallback (may queue on free tier): pnpm run apk:cloud"; true'
scripts.apk:cloud: bash scripts/with-node.sh pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.apk:local: bash -lc 'java -version >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "ERROR: Java (JDK) non installé. Installe un JDK 17 (Temurin) ou configure JAVA_HOME puis relance. (brew install --cask temurin@17)"; exit 1; }; if [[ -z "${ANDROID_HOME:-}" && -z "${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-}" && ! -d "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ]]; then echo "ERROR: Android SDK introuvable. Installe Android Studio + SDK puis relance. (brew install --cask android-studio)"; exit 1; fi; bash scripts/with-node.sh env NODE_ENV=production pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile preview --local'
scripts.apk: bash -lc 'pnpm run android:doctor; pnpm run apk:local'
scripts.test: bash scripts/with-node.sh pnpm run typecheck && bash scripts/with-node.sh pnpm run lint
